description:
Implement `hx-progress-ring` (T2 tier) — 3/6 enterprise libraries ship this. SVG-based circular progress indicator.

**Files to create** in `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-progress-ring/`:
- `index.ts`, `hx-progress-ring.ts`, `hx-progress-ring.styles.ts`, `hx-progress-ring.stories.ts`, `hx-progress-ring.test.ts`

**Props:** `value` (0-100, null = indeterminate), `size` (sm/md/lg — controls SVG diameter), `stroke-width` (number, default 4), `variant` (`default`|`success`|`warning`|`danger`), `label` (string — accessible)

**Slots:** default (center content — percentage text, icon, etc.)

**CSS Parts:** `base` (SVG), `track` (background circle), `indicator` (progress arc), `label` (center slot wrapper)

**ARIA:** `role="progressbar"`, `aria-valuenow`, `aria-valuemin="0"`, `aria-valuemax="100"`, `aria-label` from prop.

**Implementation:** SVG `<circle>` with `stroke-dasharray` and `stroke-dashoffset` calculated from `value`. For indeterminate, use rotating animation.

**Quality gates:** type-check zero errors, all tests (value updates, indeterminate), axe-core zero violations, Storybook all variants, CEM accurate, bundle < 3KB.

Register in `packages/hx-library/src/index.ts` and `packages/hx-library/vite.config.ts`.
title: IMPLEMENT: hx-progress-ring — T2 Circular Progress Indicator
